rules.name: explanatory_prefix
rules.pattern: \b(?:The function appears to be handling|The code seems to|The class is|This module is)\b

rules.name: question_to_directive
rules.pattern: \b(?:Can you explain why|Could you show me how|Would you tell me|Can you tell me)\b\s*

rules.name: context_setup
rules.pattern: \b(?:I have the following code|Here is my code|Below is the code)\b\s*[:.]?\s*

rules.name: intent_clarification
rules.pattern: \b(?:What I'm trying to do is|My objective is to|What I need is|I'm aiming to)\b\s*

rules.name: background_removal
rules.pattern: \b(?:As you may know,?\s*|As we discussed earlier,?\s*)

rules.name: purpose_statement
rules.pattern: \b(?:for the purpose of|with the goal of|in an effort to|for every)\b
